requirement_closure: Ticket ask: re-closure fixture — a ticket whose requirement_closure was re-set from partial to complete (COORD-198 recency).

critical_invariants: requirement_closure is append-only, so a re-closure leaves both the superseded and the latest block in the ordered array.
Derived verdict/debt signals must read the LATEST labelled line (recency), keeping older lines only as history.
